name: Tamamo Cat - Love confession?!
description:
Tamamo Cat confesses her love. Chaos ensues?

Art source here.

I feel like the Shooting Stars meme plays on Tamamo Cat's head 24/7...

On another note, I've been listening to Battleplan Extinguished Sins a lot since it came out a few days ago. It's just so peak...

Not a valentine's day bot just yet. I'm saving a Hakunon + Tamamo duo bot for the event, once it drops.
creator: ZenMode
